This is a testharness.js-based test.
FAIL Property box-decoration-break value 'slice' computes to 'slice' assert_true: box-decoration-break doesn't seem to be supported in the computed style expected true got false
FAIL Property box-decoration-break value 'clone' computes to 'clone' assert_true: box-decoration-break doesn't seem to be supported in the computed style expected true got false
Harness: the test ran to completion.
